title: Savory Shattering Mexican Almonds Tacos Al Pastor
description: A vegan-friendly, umami-rich Mexican dish featuring almond milk and shattering textures, perfect for a hangover cure. This tacos al pastor recipe combines the flavors of Mexico with the creaminess of almond milk.
instructions: Heat the almond milk in a bain-marie to 160 degrees Fahrenheit.
Add the pineapple juice, onion, garlic, mushrooms, chipotle peppers, cumin, and paprika to the almond milk and simmer for 10 minutes.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the almond milk mixture onto a tortilla and topping with sliced almonds.
Shatter the almonds by placing them in a plastic bag and hitting them with a rolling pin.
Sprinkle the shattered almonds over the top of the tacos.
Garnish with additional sliced almonds and chipotle peppers if desired.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
